sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_vectors (id Int32, vector1 Array(Float64), vector2 Array(Float64));
SELECT id, L2SquaredDistance(vector1, vector2) FROM test_vectors WHERE id GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT id FROM test_vectors WHERE vector1 = vector2);

SELECT L2SquaredDistance(vector1, vector2) AS distance, id FROM test_vectors WHERE distance GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT distance FROM (SELECT L2SquaredDistance(vector1, vector2) AS distance FROM test_vectors WHERE vector1 IS NOT NULL));
SELECT id, L2SquaredDistance(vector1, vector2) AS distance FROM test_vectors GROUP BY id, distance HAVING distance > 3.0;

SELECT id, L2SquaredDistance(vector1, vector2) AS distance FROM (SELECT id, vector1, vector2 FROM test_vectors WHERE id > 1) HAVING distance GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT distance FROM (SELECT id, L2SquaredDistance(vector1, vector2) AS distance FROM test_vectors WHERE vector1 IS NULL ));
SELECT id, L2SquaredDistance(vector1, vector2) AS distance FROM test_vectors ORDER BY distance DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT id, (SELECT L2SquaredDistance(vector1, vector2) FROM test_vectors t2 WHERE t2.id = t1.id) AS distance FROM test_vectors t1 WHERE distance < 10 GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT id FROM test_vectors WHERE vector1 = vector2) ORDER BY distance;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_vectors AS SELECT id, vector1, vector2 FROM test_vectors WHERE vector1 IS NOT NULL OR vector2 IS NOT NULL;
